B) Ribose Bisphosphate Carboxylase-
oxygenase
C) Ribulose Bisphosphate
D) Ribose Bisphosphate Carboxylase-
oxygenase
13.7.2 The Calvin Cycle
90. The Calvin cycle starts with ends
with (Pg. 216, E)
A) RUBIsCo, regeneration of RUBisCo
B) RUBP, regeneration of RUBisCo
C) RUBP, regeneration of RUBP
D) PGA, regeneration of PGA
91. Calvin cycle- (Pg. 216, E)
A) occurs in C; plants only
B) occurs in C4 plants only
C) occurs in both C3 & C4
D) None of these

(Pg. 216, E)

n n tion
93. The most crucial step of Calvin cycle is-
(Pg. 216, E)
A) Carbonation B) Carboxylation
C) Reduction D) Regeneration
94. Carboxylation is catalyzed by the enzyme-
